traditional_parser.name: ROSA GUTIERREZ

experience.description:
NASA / Marshall Space Flight Center , Alabama
Learned VAX / VMS system and Machine and Assembly Language
Developed understanding of Ingres database and Equal preprocessor

Introduced new program to find a peak frequency of input using the Marinco array processing
board and Vectrix graphics monitor
Tutor and Grader , CSU East Bay , September 20XX – Present
